tldr: **The article explores methods for effective brainstorming using various AI-powered tools.**

cards.title: Show HN: VS Code Agent Kanban: Task Management for the AI ...
tldr: VS Code Agent Kanban integrates a GitOps-friendly kanban board for AI-assisted developer task management.
It uses a structured markdown task format to create a permanent source of truth for decisions and actions.
It combats 'context rot' in AI coding, ensuring agents retain past decisions and planning effectively.

tldr: **A guided lab explores developing a project management application leveraging AI.**
Participants engage in a practical, hands-on session to apply AI in project contexts.

The article explores how these AI agents can enhance efficiency and support decision-making within project management offices.

cards.title: Microsoft brings Anthropic's Claude Cowork into Copilot to run tasks across Outlook, Teams, and Excel
tldr: **Microsoft integrated Anthropic's Claude Cowork into Copilot for autonomous task execution.**
Users describe tasks, and Cowork builds a plan using data from Outlook, Teams, and Excel.
Copilot can now autonomously run tasks across Microsoft 365 apps, relevant for automating routine office work.

cards.title: Top 5 Sembly AI Alternatives for AI Meeting Notes [2026]
tldr: **The article reviews top alternatives for AI meeting notes, highlighting HappyScribe's AI Notetaker.**
HappyScribe provides AI Notetaker, Subtitles, and Transcription services supporting over 120 languages.
These tools capture meetings, delivering instant notes, summaries, and action items for professional use.

cards.title: Microsoft Recommits to AI Agents With New Copilot Features
tldr: Microsoft is enhancing its Copilot features, signaling a renewed commitment to AI agents.
These advancements aim to integrate more sophisticated AI capabilities into daily business operations.
Such agentic AI developments could assist with automating routine tasks and improving workflow efficiency.

cards.title: Production AI Playbook: Human Oversight
tldr: **The article highlights the critical importance of human oversight in production AI systems to mitigate potential liabilities.**
It outlines three practical human-in-the-loop patterns: HITL for validation, HOTL for monitoring, and HOTL for intervention.
These patterns offer a framework for integrating human control into AI workflows, crucial for risk management and quality assurance.

cards.title: AI Agent: Manufacturer Onboarding and Risk Assessment Advisor
tldr: **Oracle's new AI Agent streamlines manufacturer onboarding and risk assessment for Product Lifecycle Management users.**
The agent utilizes tools like a Policy Advisor Document and a Business Object retriever for manufacturer details.
It empowers design teams with real-time guidance, reducing manual effort and noncompliance risks in new manufacturer creation.

tldr: **AI is revolutionizing construction estimating, enhancing takeoff accuracy and significantly reducing manual effort.**
AI platforms like Kamai automate measurements, extract structured data from blueprints, and provide insights.
This enables contractors to bid faster and smarter, making confident, data-driven decisions on projects.

cards.title: Enterprise Workflow Automation with Snowflake Intelligence
tldr: **Snowflake Intelligence enables building AI agents for enterprise workflow automation without coding.**
